query:
INSERT INTO artists (id, name, image_url, bio, monitored, added_at)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
         ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
           name = excluded.name,
           image_url = excluded.image_url,
           bio = COALESCE(excluded.bio, artists.bio),
           monitored = excluded.monitored
